individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am somewhat satisfied with college.My college has not reached my expectations Ihad before joining.

content.Placements: There are good placements in our college. But, very few students receive college placements, and they are offered low-LPA jobs. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA and the lowest salary offered is 3 LPA. There are no top recruiting companies for my course in our college. Out of 100, only 30% of students have joined internships in web development and data science.
content.Infrastructure: We have good computer labs available in our college, but the faculty do not use them properly for the students. Many chemistry and physics labs are also available, but the faculty has failed to utilize them effectively. Hostel food is average. Our college is very good in terms of sports, but there are no proper medical facilities available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best place for entertainment but not for studies.

content.Placements: For our batch, there is no proper placement. They are saying that they are getting placements, but these are totally useless. Most of them are BPOs only. Few companies are saying that the placement is for IT roles only, but there will be no response after the placement interviews regarding selection.
content.Infrastructure: There will be lab periods, but rarely, and practice periods are less. The hostel is like *. There are 30 members per room and nearly 150 members per floor. There are no attached washrooms, and only 5 washrooms are available for 150 students. They don't even provide racks to students.

individual_reviews.title: Good college, best placements, and best faculty.

content.Placements: I recently graduated with a Bachelor of Technology in 2023 in the stream of computer science engineering. It was an amazing experience in college. Yes, top roles are offered in my course. Yes, this course offered high-demand programming.
content.Infrastructure: No wi-fi is available in the hostel. Wi-fi is available in labs only. All facilities are available in our campus hostel. Yes, food is available for parents in the canteen. reviews_list.batch_info: International Program in Visual Arts and Design (IPVAD) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our course, and the faculty members are trained and professionals.

review_content.Placements: About 10% of student got placed in 2017 since the duration and time course vary for each individual. The highest salary offered was Rs. 65,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs.12,000 per month depending on the company and quality of work. The top recruiting company was Technicolor India. Almost all the roles were offered. The highest salary package offered was 7.8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.44 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a 2 story building, with a fully air-conditioned facility. They provide 6 labs for lectures, and 3 practise labs. Practise labs had 12 computers, each with different configuration in each lab according to the type of software. The library is also available for all types of animation books.

reviews_list.batch_info: ADVFX Plus- Advanced Program in Visual Effects - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Don't join this institute, it is not worth your money.

review_content.Placements: The institute promises to get placements while counselling. But in reality, when it comes to getting a job, its track record is very poor. All its students have to get jobs on their own. It is totally independent of colleges, and it is very difficult sometimes as the college doesn't help at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: To be honest, the infrastructure is horrible. The practice labs are completely useless with absolutely no working machines. Some teachers, on the other hand, are quite good but after few years they eventually leave as the services of the institute are very rude.

reviews_list.batch_info: International Program in Visual Arts and Design (IPVAD) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, this is a good college though.

review_content.Placements: Many of them were placed at nearly 70%. It depends on your skills. Still too low a package The top recruiting companies are Red Chilly Productions, Ajay Devgan Films, Amazon, Flipkart, etc. I am not sure which companies offer different types of internships. We also have MCL activities, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good compared to the fees they charge. There is no Wi-Fi available for students, but labs are available. There are four labs there, but the PCs are too old. The classrooms are in good condition. A library is available with some books. Due to the pandemic, there are no hostel facilities or canteen food available. There are no sports or games, but sessions are conducted and festivals are celebrated.

These long-term courses are divided into formal and informal categories.NIELIT Shimlaalso offers PGDCA in affiliation withMCRP University. The institute offers O Level, A Level, PGDCA and DCA programmes. The mode of application is both online and offline for NIELIT Shimla.

NIELIT Shimla offers O Level (equivalent to foundational level) and A Level (equivalent to advance diploma) courses. Aspirants need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to get admission in the institute. Below areNIELIT Shimla coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Admission for long-term courses is usually held in January and July. Besides, admission for short-term courses are open throughout the year. Aspirants must follow the below steps to get a seat in NIELIT Shimla:
STEP 1: NIELIT Shimla Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants can also download the form and submit it offline. Candidates need to fill out personal, academic and other details in the application form. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for the course.
STEP 2: Selection

NIELIT selects candidates for admission based on merit in the last qualifying exam. NIELIT conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for O and A Level courses. The institute evaluates the application form of the aspirants for admission. Since there are only 100 seats, the institute offers admission in MCRP PGDCA on first-come-first-serve basis. Selected candidates may be called for a virtual interview.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the aspirants are informed about their selection, they need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

reviews.review_heading: The best faculty and good facilities. I had a great college life.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. A proper library for students and teachers. Classrooms are well-designed. They had an annual sports program every year. reviews.review_heading: Our college is good enough to do graduation, and faculty members are very impressive.
reviews.review_text: The quality is good when compared to other public colleges in West Bengal. It provides ample knowledge, and teachers are also very helpful and good. The college doesn't provide hostel facilities, so it doesn't fit for long distance studies. Students can stay in any outside hostel or paying guest and complete their studies if they want.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members, but there is poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department has a classroom with projector facility and a small sound-proof studio. It also has many computers for practical purpose, along with a Wi-Fi facility. The canteen has been shut down twice within 3 years, and annual sports day is organised. Many seminars are also conducted in the hall.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, there was a library in our college with varied genres of books and novels to cater to different courses. Secondly, there was no hostel facility. Recently, a canteen had also been established. The quality of food was normal but was still improving based on student feedback.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best faculty and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious, but air conditioning is available except for a few classrooms. The library is well stocked and frequently updated with changing eras, compiling the information of various fields. The fashion department is truly awesome. They are doing great in sports too.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has full Wi-Fi facility, with good infrastructure and computer labs. We don't have hostels. Library has a huge stock of books and they allow students to stay there after the college hours. We can use the computer labs after the college hours also. My college is a government college which is afflicted under university of Calcutta.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Tool & Die Making - Batch of 2019

review_content.Placements: Placements were not very good for our batch. Students got placed in companies like Force Motor, Jaya Hind, and Motherson. Maximum students have got placed in those companies. For our senior batch, companies like Tata Motors, Jindal, Jolly Container (mould manufacturing company), and Motherson visited for placements. But the salary packages offered were low. Students are trained for 1 year in the company in which they got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms in the college are well-designed. However, the canteen is the worst. We are not even able to eat the canteen food. There is nothing available in the canteen except lunch and dinner. The quality of rice offered is not good and the daal provided is like yellow water. The main issue is with the water as drinking water is not available in canteen and hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Tool & Die Making - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college. So, you can have a great future.

review_content.Placements: Our placements are good. The placements are given successfully from our college. I got placed at Jamshedpur, in Tata Motors. The salary offered was Rs. 12,000 per month. Many companies have come to our college to conduct campus placements. Also, the placements of my seniors were good, and hopefully our junior's placement will be better than us.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good in our college. Many classrooms are there, and also there is a big library. Wi-Fi facility is provided. Also, we have CNC and Autocad room. Also, we have a big playground in the middle of the college. A big canteen is there, and also a pantry is available. Food quality was good, and also various kinds of food are available. Our hostel room was also good.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty, but the workshop is really good.

content.Placements: About 100% of students got placed. The highest package offered was 3.2 LPA, the lowest package was 2 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 to 3 LPA. content.Infrastructure: Our geography department is the most reputed department of our college. The college has various modern labs and equipment. We have educational excursions every semester. We have a good quality hostel, a gym and sports and cultural groups. We have the best workshop.
